summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ProbabilityOS application. All 8 pages working correctly with full functionality including Signal Feed, market search, arbitrage detection, geopolitical mapping, tail risk monitoring, Fed/Macro analysis, and market intelligence. Navigation between pages works seamlessly.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with live market data (128 active markets)
Signal Feed displays signal cards with sparklines and trade implications
Category filters working (All, Crypto, Fed & Macro, Geopolitics, etc.)
Chart page market search functionality working
Chart page displays price history with time intervals (1H, 6H, 1D, 1W)
Chart page shows Data Insights panel (Calibration, Smart Money Gap, YES/NO Asymmetry)
Arb Scanner loads without blank screen and shows proper messaging
Geo Heatmap loads with country list and risk color coding
Geo Heatmap allows clicking countries to view markets
Tail Risk page shows markets with <20% probability (22 markets found)
Tail Risk page displays longshot bias warnings
Fed/Macro page shows Fed markets and Macro Certainty Score gauge (98/100)
Intelligence page shows Narrative Momentum Leaderboard with Rising/Falling tabs
Intelligence page displays three insight charts (Optimism Tax, Smart Money Gap, Longshot Trap)
Navigation between all 8 pages works correctly
Regime Pill displays current status (RISK-ON)
Dark terminal aesthetic consistent throughout application
Market row navigation to Chart page working
Back button navigation working
No error messages found on any page
